channel.title: enola.bedard TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from enola.bedard

item.title: POV: you’re front row at @Sean Paul ‘s performance at Coachella!! I literally had THE BEST TIME!!!! Was dancing the entire time!!! Should I do a vlog of my day??? Let me know in the comments #seanpaul #coachella #behindthescenes
item.description: POV: you’re front row at @Sean Paul ‘s performance at Coachella!! I literally had THE BEST TIME!!!! Was dancing the entire time!!! Should I do a vlog of my day??? Let me know in the comments #seanpaul #coachella #behindthescenes
item.author: enola.bedard

item.title: Add my new song UNAVEZ to your favourite playlist on all streaming platforms ❤️🌊
item.description: Add my new song UNAVEZ to your favourite playlist on all streaming platforms ❤️🌊
item.author: enola.bedard

item.title: I was filming a dance video and then this happened…. @Sean Paul 🤩🔥🙌🏻 my best Coachella moment ever!!!!! #behindthescenes
item.description: I was filming a dance video and then this happened…. @Sean Paul 🤩🔥🙌🏻 my best Coachella moment ever!!!!! #behindthescenes
item.author: enola.bedard

item.title: They way they all joined in😳🙌🏻🔥 new dance video coming this week who’s ready???? #unavez #behindthescenes #dance
item.description: They way they all joined in😳🙌🏻🔥 new dance video coming this week who’s ready???? #unavez #behindthescenes #dance
item.author: enola.bedard

item.title: Get Ready with me for Coachella weekend 2 lets gooo!!! Stay tuned for a new dance video to my song UNAVEZ!!!! @L’Oréal Paris @L’Oréal Professionnel @Redken
item.description: Get Ready with me for Coachella weekend 2 lets gooo!!! Stay tuned for a new dance video to my song UNAVEZ!!!! @L’Oréal Paris @L’Oréal Professionnel @Redken
item.author: enola.bedard

item.title: Try this transition for your favourite outfit to my new song! I will share my favourite 🤩🙌🏻🔥
item.description: Try this transition for your favourite outfit to my new song! I will share my favourite 🤩🙌🏻🔥
item.author: enola.bedard

item.title: When the @CRASH ADAMS 🚀 asked me in the street to freestyle in french on their song😳😳😳🔥 comment how I did on 1-10! This was so fuuunn!!! #freestyle #french #behindthescenes
item.description: When the @CRASH ADAMS 🚀 asked me in the street to freestyle in french on their song😳😳😳🔥 comment how I did on 1-10! This was so fuuunn!!! #freestyle #french #behindthescenes
item.author: enola.bedard

item.title: I had the BEST TIME!!!!! Let me know who was your favourite performance????? Now Imm back working hard on music stay tuned for a new music video this week!!!!!
item.description: I had the BEST TIME!!!!! Let me know who was your favourite performance????? Now Imm back working hard on music stay tuned for a new music video this week!!!!!
item.author: enola.bedard

item.title: I was filming a dance video at Coachella and then this happened 🤩🙌🏻🔥 @POLINA GLEN
item.description: I was filming a dance video at Coachella and then this happened 🤩🙌🏻🔥 @POLINA GLEN
item.author: enola.bedard

item.title: Replying to @Ken Bradley if you liked my french freestyle go listen to my new song UNAVEZ in 3 languages 🫶🏻❤️🫶🏻❤️
item.description: Replying to @Ken Bradley if you liked my french freestyle go listen to my new song UNAVEZ in 3 languages 🫶🏻❤️🫶🏻❤️
item.author: enola.bedard

item.title: Unavez - Dance Video (teaser) officially out 04/22 9am PT time! Comment UNAVEZ if you are ready!!! #unavez #teaser #dance
item.description: Unavez - Dance Video (teaser) officially out 04/22 9am PT time! Comment UNAVEZ if you are ready!!! #unavez #teaser #dance
item.author: enola.bedard

item.title: The way @Sean Paul joins in!! You know we had to hit the Ready for the Ride dance challenge together!🔥🔥🙌🏻 #coachella #seanpaul
item.description: The way @Sean Paul joins in!! You know we had to hit the Ready for the Ride dance challenge together!🔥🔥🙌🏻 #coachella #seanpaul
item.author: enola.bedard

item.title: New Dance!!!! Learn this one and tag me!!! Can’t wait for you all to see the full dance video this coming Wednesday 04/22 on my YouTube Channel 🤩🙌🏻🤩🙌🏻 #unavez #dance #public
item.description: New Dance!!!! Learn this one and tag me!!! Can’t wait for you all to see the full dance video this coming Wednesday 04/22 on my YouTube Channel 🤩🙌🏻🤩🙌🏻 #unavez #dance #public
item.author: enola.bedard

item.title: When we did a FULL OUT dance concept video in public to my new song UNAVEZ full video out tomorrow who’s ready???? Comment to see the results! #behindthescenes #unavez #danceinpublic
item.description: When we did a FULL OUT dance concept video in public to my new song UNAVEZ full video out tomorrow who’s ready???? Comment to see the results! #behindthescenes #unavez #danceinpublic
item.author: enola.bedard

item.title: Replying to @Sebastian Wachsmann When I freestyled a full french verse in @CRASH ADAMS 🚀 ‘s song!!!!! You guys want the full version??🤩🤩 thank you so much for all the love!!! Et oui je parle francais je viens du quebec hihi
item.description: Replying to @Sebastian Wachsmann When I freestyled a full french verse in @CRASH ADAMS 🚀 ‘s song!!!!! You guys want the full version??🤩🤩 thank you so much for all the love!!! Et oui je parle francais je viens du quebec hihi
item.author: enola.bedard

item.title: Unavez - Dance Video OUT NOW on my YouTube Channel!☀️🌴🌊 go watch the full video now!!! I brought 30 chairs in public and we had SO MUCH FUN!!!! Let me know your fav parts in the comment! #unavez #dance #public
item.description: Unavez - Dance Video OUT NOW on my YouTube Channel!☀️🌴🌊 go watch the full video now!!! I brought 30 chairs in public and we had SO MUCH FUN!!!! Let me know your fav parts in the comment! #unavez #dance #public
item.author: enola.bedard

item.title: In honor of the Michael Jackson Movie coming out on April 24th you know I had to repost this iconic dance!! 🔥 #scream #michaeljackson
item.description: In honor of the Michael Jackson Movie coming out on April 24th you know I had to repost this iconic dance!! 🔥 #scream #michaeljackson
item.author: enola.bedard

item.title: One of my favourite part from the UNAVEZ dance video the dance break!!! Who’s gonna learn this one?? To all my dancers following me I wanna see you all hit this one🫶🏻🫶🏻🫶🏻

item.title: This choreography will FOREVER be iconic!!! In honor of the Michael Jackson Movie coming out tomorrow I had to repost this one. Who remembers????? #beatit #michaeljackson

item.title: Im telling you guys so many stuff happens when I shoot this dance….😏🤣 @augustogimenez @Nicolle Figueroa dc: @tracy.oj

item.title: Dancing next to @JLO was a dream come true! What a great way to start the year. Who is gonna learn this dance??? #CantGetEnough @DYNAMIC LEGENDS @Baby lawd jiggy boss @kidmac10

item.title: When we did a FULL OUT concept video to Jet Ski in public 👀 wait for the reactions ahahha! Who wanna see the results????? Full video out TOMORROW cant wait🇧🇷🔥🙌🏻 #jetski #behindthescenes #brazil
